tuning: E A D G B E
content:
AMAZED                  Lonestar



[ch]Ab[/ch]                        [ch]Eb[/ch]

Every time our eyes meet This feeling inside me

[ch]Db[/ch]

Is almost more then I can take

[ch]Ab[/ch]                     [ch]Eb[/ch]          

Baby when you touch me I can feel how much you love me

[ch]Db[/ch]

And it just blows me away

[ch]B[/ch]                               [ch]F#[/ch]

I've never been this close to anyone or anything

[ch]B[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]Db[/ch]                   

I can hear your thoughts I can see your dreams



CHORUS:

[ch]Db[/ch]                               [ch]Ab[/ch] 

I don't know how you do what you do

([ch]Ab[/ch])                [ch]Bbm[/ch]                         [ch]Gb[/ch]

I'm so in love with you it just keeps getting better

[ch]Db[/ch]                              [ch]Ab[/ch]                [ch]Bbm[/ch]               [ch]Gb[/ch]

I  wanna spend the rest of my life with you by my side forever and ever

[ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]Db[/ch]                     [ch]Ab[/ch] 

Every little thing that you do Baby I'm amazed by you



[ch]Ab[/ch]                          [ch]Eb[/ch]

The smell of your skin The taste of your kiss

[ch]Db[/ch]

The way you whisper in the dark

[ch]Ab[/ch]                     [ch]Eb[/ch] 

Your hair all around me baby you surround me

[ch]Db[/ch] 

You touch every place in my heart

[ch]B[/ch]                     [ch]F#[/ch]    

Or it feels like the first time every time

[ch]B[/ch]                             [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]Db[/ch] 

I wanna spend the whole night in your eyes



Go to chorus, lead

[ch]Db[/ch]                          [ch]Ab[/ch]                     [ch]Bbm[/ch] 

Every little thing that you do I'm so in love with you

                       [ch]Gb[/ch]        [ch]Db[/ch] 

It just keeps getting better-ter-er

([ch]Db[/ch])                          [ch]Ab[/ch]                  [ch]Bbm[/ch]               [ch]Gb[/ch]

I wanna spend the rest of my life with you by my side  forever and ever

[ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]Db[/ch]

Every little thing that you do (Every little thing that you do)  Oh oh

[ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]Db[/ch]

Every little thing that you do

                    [ch]Ab[/ch]

Baby I'm amazed by you


enjoy
